nodes.label: AI as mundane task handler
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to use AI mostly for the more mundane aspects of my job

nodes.label: AI as interactive problem-solving partner
nodes.grounding_span: Being able to talk through a problem with a 'person' often leads me to solving my own problems

nodes.label: AI reliability and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: overall not 100% trusting the output of any AI model

nodes.label: AI as learning and comprehension tool
nodes.grounding_span: using it as a learning tool

nodes.label: Human oversight and accountability
nodes.grounding_span: there will always be some need for human oversight

nodes.label: Understanding and epistemic confidence
nodes.grounding_span: If I don't understand the code, how can I explain it to my superiors

nodes.label: Job security and professional growth
nodes.grounding_span: anyone would be forgiven for questioning their job security

nodes.label: Skeptical trust in AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: overall not 100% trusting the output of any AI model

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as baseline expectation
nodes.grounding_span: when the AI does it's job well, that's the bare minimum I'd expect

nodes.label: Openness to AI as learning tool
nodes.grounding_span: using it as a learning tool, especially as it gets more reliable

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and back-and-forth interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I'll go back and forth tweaking paragraphs

nodes.label: Decomposition of complex problems into manageable chunks
nodes.grounding_span: break the problem down into some chunks that I'll throw at the AI
